style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Left column: three boxes labelled « VUE ». They bind with arrows to a middle column of « COMPOSABLE » boxes: « useFetch », « useServices », « useForms », « useNotificationStream », each tagged « { data, loading, error, refresh } ». The composables point to a single box « CLIENT AXIOS » on the right. Above, a separate box « MAGASIN AUTH PINIA (utilisateur, rôles, déconnexion par inactivité) » connects to the views. A small gate labelled « DOMPURIFY » sits on a user-HTML arrow into a view, and a box « FORMKIT » feeds a form view. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Left column: three boxes labelled « VUE ». They bind with arrows to a middle column of « COMPOSABLE » boxes: « useFetch », « useServices », « useForms », « useNotificationStream », each tagged « { data, loading, error, refresh } ». The composables point to a single box « CLIENT AXIOS » on the right. Above, a separate box « MAGASIN AUTH PINIA (utilisateur, rôles, déconnexion par inactivité) » connects to the views. A small gate labelled « DOMPURIFY » sits on a user-HTML arrow into a view, and a box « FORMKIT » feeds a form view. No logos, no people. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
